summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ROSHKA STUDIO website - all core functionalities working perfectly. Backend APIs 100% success rate, mobile hamburger menu fixed and fully functional, contact form with Google Sheets integration and email notifications working, all sections display correctly with premium dark theme and gold accents.
passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (100% success rate - 6/6 tests passed)
Homepage loads with enhanced dark premium theme (black + gold)
Mobile hamburger menu opens with full-screen overlay showing all navigation links
All desktop and mobile navigation links work and scroll to correct sections
Contact form submission works with proper validation
Google Sheets integration - form data successfully saved to database and sheets
Email notification system working (Gmail SMTP configured)
All 7 sections display correctly (Hero, Services, About, Portfolio, Process, Contact, Footer)
Premium design elements verified (dark theme with gold accents rgb(212, 175, 55))
All interactive elements properly clickable and styled
Form validation working (invalid email returns proper 422 error)
Success message displays after form submission

success_percentage.integration: 100% (form submissions, Google Sheets, email notifications working)
